zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Dorothy Tyrrell於1459年出生在英國素福爾可斯托馬可特時，她的父親Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping51歲，母親Margaret Darcy35歲。她於大約1482年與John Boteler在英國英格蘭賀福爾沃爾頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1491年在南非特藍斯瓦阿爾武德哈爾享年32歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Dorothy Tyrrell于1459年出生在英国素福爾可斯托馬可特时，她的父亲Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping51岁，母亲Margaret Darcy35岁。她于大约1482年与John Boteler在英国英格兰賀福爾沃爾頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1491年在南非特藍斯瓦阿爾武德哈爾享年32岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東。

nameMeanings.name: Tyrrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): perhaps a nickname from a derivative of Old French tirer ‘to pull’, in the same sense as French Tirand ‘one who pulls on the reins’, hence ‘obstinate, stubborn’. This name may have become confused with Turrell . A branch of this Anglo-Norman family has been in Ireland since the 12th century. Its name has been Gaelicized as Tirial.
English: habitational name from Tirril (Cumbria), which derives from Old Norse tyri ‘resinous wood’ + erg ‘shieling’.

variants.name: Terrel
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Terrell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Tirrell
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Terrill
meanings: English (Cornwall; of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Turrell
meanings: most frequently an Anglo-Norman French pronunciation of Thorold (Old Norse Thóraldr, from the elements Thórr ‘Thor’ + valdr ‘power, rule’). This name and that in 2 may have become confused with Tyrrell .
from Middle English T(h)urild (Old Norse Thórhildr, Thorild, the latter a rare woman's name from the divine name Thórr ‘Thor’ + hildr ‘battle’).

variants.name: Tyrell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Trill
meanings: German: topographic name for someone who lived by the turnstile at the entrance to a village.
English (Sussex, also Kent): nickname, perhaps from Middle English tril(le) ‘turn, roll, whirl, spin’ (origin unknown, but perhaps Old English tyrl).

English (Sussex, also Kent) and Welsh: habitational name from one or more places named with Middle English tril(le) ‘turn, roll, whirl, spin’ (Old English tyrl), often used to describe moving water, such as Trill in Axminster (Devon), Tirle Brook (Gloucestershire and Worcestershire), and Trill Mill Brook (Oxfordshire).

nameMeanings.name: Dorothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothie
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Dorothy Tyrrell was born in 1459, in Stowmarket, Suffolk, England, her father, Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping, was 51 and her mother, Margaret Darcy, was 35. She married John Boteler about 1482, in Walton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1491, in Woodhall, Transvaal, South Africa, at the age of 32, and was buried in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.Watton-at-Stone, Hertfordshire, England: Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Dorothy Tyrrell est née en 1459, à Stowmarket, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Margaret Darcy, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé John Boteler environ 1482, à Walton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1491, à Woodhall, Transvaal, Afrique du Sud, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterrée à Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.Watton-at-Stone, Hertfordshire, England: Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Dorothy Tyrrell 1459 in Stowmarket, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping 51 und ihre Mutter Margaret Darcy 35. Sie hat um 1482 in Walton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom John Boteler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1491 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Woodhall, Transvaal, Südafrika und wurde in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Dorothy Tyrrell è nata il nel 1459 nel Stowmarket, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Margaret Darcy, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato John Boteler circa 1482, nel Walton, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1491, nel Woodhall, Transvaal, Sudafrica, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolta a Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Dorothy Tyrrellが1459年にイギリススフォルクストウマーケトで生まれた時，父Sir William Tyrrell of Gippingは51歳，母Margaret Darcyは35歳であった。約1482年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアワルトンでJohn Botelerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1491年に南アフリカトランスヴァアルウッドハルで32歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアワットオン アト ストーンにて埋葬された。

ko.Watton-at-Stone, Hertfordshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Dorothy Tyrrell(이)가 1459년 영국 수폴크 스타우마크트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Darcy(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1482년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 월턴에서 John Boteler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1491년 남아프리카 트랜스바앨 우드홀에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤에 묻혔다.

pt.Watton-at-Stone, Hertfordshire, England: Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Dorothy Tyrrell nasceu em 1459, em Stowmarket, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Darcy, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com John Boteler aproximadamente 1482, em Walton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1491, em Woodhall, Transvaal, África do Sul, com 32 anos, e foi sepultada em Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Watton-at-Stone, Hertfordshire, England: ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Dorothy Tyrrell родилась в 1459 г. в местности стоумаркет, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Darcy, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Boteler около 1482 г. в местности валтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1491 г. в местности вудхолл, трансвааль, Южная Африка в возрасте 32 лет и была похоронена в местности ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Dorothy Tyrrell nació en 1459, en Stowmarket, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Tyrrell of Gipping, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Margaret Darcy, tenía 35 años. Se casó con John Boteler aproximadamente 1482, en Walton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1491, en Woodhall, Transvaal, Sudáfrica, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultada en Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
